name: restaurant owners managing payroll for 5–15 employees tool
description: For restaurant owners managing payroll for 5–15 employees, inefficient manual processes cause payroll errors and delays. We automate timesheet collection and tip calculations instead of manual payroll processing using spreadsheets.
target_audience: restaurant owners managing payroll for 5–15 employees
problem_solved: Inefficient manual payroll processes leading to errors and delays.
